mapper.select: SELECT a.name FROM authority a INNER JOIN role_authority ra ON a.id = ra.authority_id WHERE ra.role = #{role} ORDER BY a.category, a.name
SELECT id, name, description, category, created_at as createdAt FROM authority ORDER BY category, name
SELECT id, name, description, category, created_at as createdAt FROM authority WHERE category = #{category} ORDER BY name
SELECT id, name, description, category, created_at as createdAt FROM authority WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO authority (name, description, category, created_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{category}, NOW())
